headline: The White House reversed export curbs on Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models within two weeks, restoring frontier deployment access.
body: The quarter's clearest shift was regulatory: the White House imposed and then dropped restrictions on Anthropic's most advanced models, with access to Fable set to restore beginning July 1. Alongside that, the Model Context Protocol emerged as a connective standard for agents, with Google Cloud demonstrating an enterprise agentic platform (FynanceAI) that orchestrates data across Oracle, Looker, and vector stores. Model evaluation drew attention as Sonnet 5 was reported to underperform GLM-5.2 and Opus while costing more. On the technique side, code-oriented methods including AST-aware chunking, tree-sitter, keyword matching, and HNSW broke out as new entrants.
